entities.name: sleep_stages
entities.context: Database table storing sleep stage data with fields: sleep_log_id, stage, start_time_local, duration_sec, source

entities.name: intraday_heart_rate
entities.context: Database table containing granular heart rate samples used to compute workout HR metrics

entities.name: compute_workout_hr_from_intraday
entities.context: Python function that computes avg_hr and peak_hr from intraday heart rate data for a given workout window

entities.name: sleep_log_id
entities.context: Foreign key linking sleep stages to a parent sleep log record

entities.name: workout_hr_metrics
entities.context: Derived metrics (avg_hr, peak_hr, sample_count) computed from intraday heart rate during a workout window

entities.name: SQLite
entities.context: Database engine used via sqlite3.Connection for health data storage

entities.name: Bio-Tracking Pipeline
entities.context: Health data ingestion system that processes sleep stages and workout heart rate from wearable sources

relationships.context: Queries intraday_heart_rate table to derive workout HR metrics within a time window
Each sleep stage row references a parent sleep log via sleep_log_id
Pipeline ingests sleep stage data into the sleep_stages table
Pipeline computes workout heart rate metrics from intraday data
Sleep stage records stored in SQLite database
Function takes sqlite3.Connection to query heart rate data
